section_name: Sale of Vehicle; Transfer of Title
text:
(a) Except as provided by Sections 503.036 (Reassignment of Evidence of Ownership; Dealer Categories) and 503.039 (Public Motor Vehicle Auctions) , a motor vehicle may not be the subject of a subsequent sale unless the owner designated on the title submits a transfer of ownership of the title.

(b) The transfer of the title must be in a manner prescribed by the department that:

(1) certifies the purchaser is the owner of the vehicle; and

(2) certifies there are no liens on the vehicle or provides a release of each lien on the vehicle.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.071 — Sale of Vehicle; Transfer of Title

(a) Except as provided by Sections 503.036 (Reassignment of Evidence of Ownership; Dealer Categories) and 503.039 (Public Motor Vehicle Auctions) , a motor vehicle may not be the subject of a subsequent sale unless the owner designated on the title submits a transfer of ownership of the title.

(b) The transfer of the title must be in a manner prescribed by the department that:

    (1) certifies the purchaser is the owner of the vehicle; and

    (2) certifies there are no liens on the vehicle or provides a release of each lien on the vehicle.

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 969 (S.B.2076), Sec. 14, eff. September 1, 2017.*

subsections.label: a

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The transfer of the title must be in a manner prescribed by the department that:
certifies the purchaser is the owner of the vehicle; and
certifies there are no liens on the vehicle or provides a release of each lien on the vehicle.

history.raw: Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 969 (S.B.2076), Sec. 14, eff. September 1, 2017.
